description_long: This bungalow features a wooden structure with a prominent blue, double-gabled roof adorned with decorative wooden finials at each end. The front entrance is framed by a stone pathway and a small porch area, with a wooden door set into the center of the facade. The building is surrounded by a grassy yard, with stylized trees and a simple wooden fence on one side. The roof is covered in blue shingles, and the walls are constructed from vertical wooden planks. The stone foundation and pathway add a rustic touch, while the overall design suggests a blend of traditional and fantasy architectural influences. The windows are small and rectangular, positioned on the side walls, and the structure appears to be a single-story dwelling.
description: A wooden bungalow with a blue double-gabled roof, stone foundation, and small porch, surrounded by grass, trees, and a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stone pathway, porch, and two stylized trees flanking the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue shingled roof, a small rectangular window, and the wooden fence extending along the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gable, stone foundation, and a single tree, with no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the blue roof, another small window, and the grassy yard with trees.
